tests.name: auth.api.spec.ts › API · authentication › POST /api/login with valid credentials returns 200 and a token
auth.api.spec.ts › API · authentication › POST /api/login with a wrong password returns 401
auth.api.spec.ts › API · authentication › POST /api/login with empty fields returns 400
auth.api.spec.ts › API · authentication › [TC-API-002] GET /api/tasks without a token returns 401
tasks.api.spec.ts › API · tasks › GET /api/tasks returns 200 with the standard envelope
tasks.api.spec.ts › API · tasks › GET /api/tasks/:id returns a single task
tasks.api.spec.ts › API · tasks › [TC-API-003] GET /api/tasks/9999 returns 404
tasks.api.spec.ts › API · tasks › [TC-API-001] POST /api/tasks creates a task (201)
tasks.api.spec.ts › API · tasks › POST /api/tasks without a title returns 400
tasks.api.spec.ts › API · tasks › PUT /api/tasks/:id updates a task (200)
tasks.api.spec.ts › API · tasks › PATCH /api/tasks/:id/status updates the status (200)
tasks.api.spec.ts › API · tasks › PATCH /api/tasks/:id/status with an invalid status returns 400
tasks.api.spec.ts › API · tasks › DELETE /api/tasks/:id removes a task (200)
tasks.api.spec.ts › API · tasks › DELETE /api/tasks/:id returns 404 for a missing task
tasks.api.spec.ts › API · tasks › [TC-API-004] GET /api/tasks?status=DONE (uppercase) should be case-insensitive [BUG-108]
tasks.api.spec.ts › API · tasks › the status filter is case-sensitive today — characterizes BUG-108
auth.spec.ts › Authentication › [TC-001] logs in with valid credentials and redirects to /tasks
auth.spec.ts › Authentication › [TC-002] rejects a wrong password with a 401 and stays on the login page
auth.spec.ts › Authentication › [TC-003] validates empty fields on the client without calling the API
auth.spec.ts › Authentication › [TC-004] validates an invalid email format
auth.spec.ts › Authentication › logs out and returns to the login page
filters.spec.ts › Status filters › [TC-009] the "All" filter shows every seeded task
filters.spec.ts › Status filters › the counter matches the number of visible rows
filters.spec.ts › Status filters › [TC-009] the "To Do" filter shows only To Do tasks
filters.spec.ts › Status filters › [TC-009] the "In Progress" filter shows only In Progress tasks
filters.spec.ts › Status filters › [TC-009] the "Done" filter shows only Done tasks
tasks.spec.ts › Task management › [TC-005] creates a task and shows it in the list
tasks.spec.ts › Task management › [TC-006] edits an existing task and persists the changes
tasks.spec.ts › Task management › [TC-007] deletes a task after confirmation
tasks.spec.ts › Task management › [TC-008] changes a task status
tasks.spec.ts › Task management › [TC-010] lists tasks sorted by id ascending
tasks.spec.ts › Task management › [TC-011] create task submits once on double-click [BUG-107]
